description: Stay warm and stylish this winter with this ladies' thermal vest. Knitted with an eye-catching pointelle pattern in pure white, this sleeveless top offers 0.45 tog comfort and warmth. Perfect for both winter sports and casualwear, the stretch fabric ensures a perfect fit. Get ready for the ski season in this cosy, stylish vest! White sleeveless pointelle knitted thermal vest for women. Made from a synthetic yarn and knitted in a heat-retaining pointelle design. Brushed on the reverse to help trap extra heat. Lace-trimmed round neck. Available in UK Sizes 10-12 (to fit bust up to 91.5cm/36‚Äù), 14-16 (to fit bust 94-100cm/37-39.5‚Äù), 18-20 (to fit bust 101-109cm/40-43‚Äù). Made from 65% Polyester, 35% Viscose. Machine washable.
